ksa_text: Knowledge of data asset management principles and practices, including data discovery, asset inventory and cataloging, ownership assignment, lifecycle tracking, and value assessment of data assets.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-016 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.425 composite (highest: NICE at 0.425) and is in_scope for the ISO 8000 Data Technician role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for technician-level ISO 8000 Data Technician.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, NICE signal (0.425), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NICE signal (0.425) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual ISO 8000 Data Technician requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at technician level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.425 is market-validated for ISO 8000 Data Technician. Final decision: include.
